course.

So, you know, the metric.

I'm not sure if that's because Google is maybe not associating Galileo with security for whatever reason.
we have a weaker product offering there.

that are performing well already should give us some additional sort of performance boost.

instructional ending I think I I

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Slight drop in sessions/views, but no alarming changes in GSC metrics; likely seasonal variation](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Strategy focus: Double down on successful topics (metrics, agent evals), shift away from underperforming areas (e.g., AI security)](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Website improvements: Add "last updated" field for blogs, expand featured section to showcase top 4 posts, implement blog filtering](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [7 articles staged for publishing before Friday](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [\~34 articles (not 16 as initially reported) awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [4 new articles to be produced this week](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Continuing content refreshes and audits of top-performing blogs](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Drop in sessions (turquoise line) and views this week](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Average position across categories stable (e.g., metrics: 8.11 → 8.66)](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [No major changes in GSC data (impressions, CTR) across categories](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic holding steady](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on doubling down on successful topics: metrics and agent evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Shift away from underperforming areas like AI security](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Increase volume of content refreshes for well-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Monitor performance of vertical-specific content (e.g., financial services, healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [Add "last updated" field for blog posts (needs careful implementation to avoid disrupting blog order)](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Expand featured section to showcase top 4 posts](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Implement filtering system for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Fix floating Table of Contents (TOC) issue](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

### Reporting Updates

  - [GrowthX revamping reporting system, moving away from Looker](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Integrating Scrunch for expanded LLM referral tracking and content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [New dashboard expected in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to stage 7 articles for publishing by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Jackson to follow up on floating TOC fix with Jeff](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Conor to share draft of updated messaging with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Jackson to add "last updated" field and expanded featured section to website roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue content refreshes, audits, and production of 4 new articles](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Team to revisit performance metrics next week to confirm if drop is seasonal](https://fathom.video/share/2Qg-71zz8rzvdXN8xWdP69ekYz9evxYu?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

action_items.description: Add "last updated" date field for blogs to website roadmap
Add expanded featured section (4 most recent posts) to blog to website roadmap
Follow up with Jeff re: fixing floating TOC issue ASAP
